hero.title: Mario Ortega
hero.subtitle: Fullstack Developer
hero.description: Specialized in Angular and Laravel, passionate about building functional and well-structured web applications on both frontend and backend.

about.title: About Me
about.bio: Fullstack Developer specialized in Angular and Laravel, graduated in Web Application Development. Passionate about building functional and well-structured web applications on both frontend and backend. I have developed personal projects including VS Code and Chrome extensions, along with professional internship experience developing with Flutter.

items.name: CS2 Config Support
items.description: VS Code extension providing syntax highlighting, autocompletion, and IntelliSense for Counter-Strike 2 configuration files.

items.name: CS2 Lens
items.description: Chrome extension that displays detailed CS2 stats and inventory value directly on Steam profiles.

items.name: CS2 Lens Proxy
items.description: Secure API proxy for the cs2-lens extension, managing external API calls efficiently and securely.
Mobile application development with Flutter, involved in modernizing 2 existing applications, as well as implementing new features and fixing bugs on a third one.
